Footer.tagline: Strategy-led pricing optimization for B2B SaaS companies ready to unlock trapped revenue.

CTABanner.description: Join hundreds of SaaS companies that have already transformed their pricing into a growth engine.

HomePage.heroTitle: Your pricing is leaving money on the table.
HomePage.heroSubtitle: PriceLayer helps B2B SaaS companies unlock revenue trapped in their pricing. We design tiers, packaging, and monetization strategies that grow revenue and reduce churn.
HomePage.servicesSubtitle: We work alongside your team to design pricing that drives growth. No platform lock-in, no ongoing software fees.
HomePage.service1Description: Design optimal tiers, feature gating, and price points backed by willingness-to-pay research and competitive analysis.
HomePage.service2Description: Bundle features into packages that drive expansion revenue, reduce decision friction, and align with how customers actually buy.
HomePage.service3Description: Identify revenue leaks in your current model. We analyze your pricing, usage data, and churn patterns to find quick wins.
HomePage.howItWorksSubtitle: A proven three-phase process that minimizes risk and maximizes impact.
HomePage.step1Description: We audit your current pricing, interview customers, and benchmark against your competitive landscape.
HomePage.step2Description: We model and test new pricing structures, run simulations, and design packaging that maps to your value metrics.
HomePage.step3Description: We help you roll out pricing changes with migration plans, change communication, and churn mitigation strategies.
HomePage.positioningTitleLine1: You don't need another billing tool.
HomePage.positioningDescription: Paddle, Stripe, and Chargebee handle billing infrastructure. But the right infrastructure with the wrong pricing still leaves revenue on the table. PriceLayer is the strategy layer that sits above your billing stack — ensuring every tier, feature gate, and price point is optimized for growth.
HomePage.testimonial1Quote: PriceLayer helped us restructure our pricing from a flat rate to usage-based tiers. Our expansion revenue increased 34% in the first quarter.
HomePage.testimonial2Quote: We were underpricing our enterprise tier by 40%. PriceLayer's audit paid for itself in the first month.
HomePage.testimonial3Quote: The packaging redesign reduced our sales cycle by two weeks. Prospects could self-select the right tier without a demo.
HomePage.finalCtaHeadline: Ready to stop guessing on pricing?

AboutPage.heroSubtitle: We believe pricing is the most underleveraged growth lever in SaaS. Most companies spend months on product and minutes on pricing. We exist to change that.
AboutPage.approachP1: PriceLayer combines rigorous quantitative research with deep SaaS domain expertise. Every engagement starts with understanding your customers, your competitive landscape, and your growth objectives.
AboutPage.approachP2Suffix: to design pricing that aligns what you charge with the value your customers actually receive.
AboutPage.approachP3: The result: higher conversion rates, better expansion revenue, lower churn, and a pricing model that scales with your business.
AboutPage.team1Bio: Former VP of Pricing at a $500M ARR SaaS company. 12 years of experience in B2B pricing strategy and monetization.
AboutPage.team2Bio: Data scientist turned pricing specialist. Built pricing models for 80+ SaaS companies across fintech, DevTools, and MarTech.
AboutPage.team3Bio: 10 years in product marketing and go-to-market strategy. Expert in tier design, feature gating, and launch communication.
AboutPage.team4Bio: PhD in behavioral economics. Leads willingness-to-pay research and conjoint analysis for every client engagement.
AboutPage.value1Description: Every recommendation is backed by data — willingness-to-pay research, competitive benchmarking, and usage analytics. We don't guess.
AboutPage.value2Description: Good pricing grows revenue and makes customers feel they're getting a fair deal. We optimize for long-term trust, not short-term extraction.
AboutPage.value3Description: Pricing isn't a one-time project. We build ongoing relationships and return for pricing reviews as your product and market evolve.

ContactPage.heroSubtitle: Tell us about your company and we'll get back to you within one business day.
ContactPage.successDescription: We'll get back to you within one business day.
ContactPage.placeholderMessage: Tell us about your pricing challenge...
ContactPage.responseBody: We respond within one business day, usually faster.
ContactPage.expectBody: A 30-minute intro call to understand your current pricing model, challenges, and growth goals. No pitch, just a conversation.

SignupPage.heroTitle: Get started with a free pricing diagnostic.
SignupPage.heroSubtitle: Tell us about your company and we'll schedule a complimentary 30-minute pricing review.
SignupPage.successDescription: We'll reach out within one business day to schedule your free diagnostic call.
SignupPage.placeholderChallenge: e.g. We're not sure if our tiers are right, we think we're underpricing enterprise...
SignupPage.nextStep1Description: We review your current pricing model, identify quick wins, and assess the opportunity.
SignupPage.nextStep2Description: Based on the diagnostic, we build a tailored engagement plan with clear deliverables and timeline.
SignupPage.nextStep3Description: We execute the strategy together — from research through design to rollout support.
